attributes.description: Inventory active AI-related Chrome browser extensions across all users. Use for shadow AI discovery — identifies Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Codeium, Tabnine, Grammarly, and other AI writing and coding assistant extensions installed in Chrome.
attributes.query:
SELECT
    ce.name,
    ce.identifier,
    ce.version,
    ce.description,
    ce.path,
    ce.state,
    u.username
FROM users u CROSS JOIN chrome_extensions ce USING(uid)
WHERE ce.state = 1 AND (
    ce.name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR ce.name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Claude%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Gemini%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR ce.name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Merlin%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Sider%' OR ce.name LIKE '%MaxAI%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%UseChatGPT%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Poe%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Cody%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Codeium%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Tabnine%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Blackbox%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Phind%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Bito%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Grammarly%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Jasper%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Wordtune%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Quillbot%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%QuillBot%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Compose AI%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Writesonic%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Copy.ai%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%You.com%' OR ce.name LIKE '%AIPRM%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%WebChatGPT%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Glasp%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Eightify%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%NoteGPT%' OR ce.name LIKE '%tl;dv%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%DeepL%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Immersive Translate%');
